signals.headline: Bitcoin's 'Uptober' Streak Ends with 3
signals.raw:
Bitcoin's 'Uptober' Streak Ends with 3.6% Decline in October 2025 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin fell 3.6% in October 2025 for the first time since 2018, closing around $110,000 after peaking above $126,000 earlier in the month, driven by $19B liquidations, Trump's China tariffs, and Fed hesitation on rate cuts[3]. This confirmed break of historical October gains (positive in 10 of 12 years) s
